listitem.para: Explain the name format for Guatemalans at birth and at matrimony.
What languages besides Spanish are spoken by Guatemalans and Mayans?
Explain the concept of “evil eye”. What could one do to break a spell of the “evil eye”?
Explain common infectious diseases among Guatemalan natives? What resources could be suggested to increase disease prevention?
What are common eye problems among Guatemalans? What are some reasons for these eye problems?
Identify common birthing practices that are used by women of Guatemalan heritage?
What folk illnesses are common among Guatemalans and Mayans?
What routes do Guatemalans prefer for medication administration?
If a Guatemalan dies in the United States (and probably elsewhere) and the family wants to have the body returned to Guatemala, what resources are available to assist the family?
How is fatalism displayed among Guatemalans?
How would you assess jaundice, cyanosis, and petechiae in dark-skinned Guatemalans?
